summary: Tested Excel/CSV Import Mapping for Members with all columns. All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend import dialog verified with all expected elements.

csv_import_basic.description: Import CSV with all columns (Nome, Apelido, Data Nascimento, Email, Função, Número, Posição, Telefone, Nacionalidade, Sexo)

excel_import.description: Import Excel (.xlsx) files with all columns

position_normalization_gr.description: Position normalization for GR (Guarda-Redes, goalkeeper, etc.)

position_normalization_jc.description: Position normalization for JC (Jogador de Campo, field player, etc.)

nationality_conversion_pt.description: Nationality conversion to ISO code PT (Portuguesa, Portugal)

nationality_conversion_br.description: Nationality conversion to ISO code BR (Brasileira, Brasil)

nationality_conversion_es.description: Nationality conversion to ISO code ES (Espanhola, Espanha)

duplicate_email_warning.description: Duplicate emails generate warnings but still create users

gender_normalization.description: Gender/Sexo normalization (Masculino, M, male, Feminino, F, female)

club_association.description: Members associated with club_id on import

team_association.description: Members associated with team_id when provided

import_dialog_ui.description: Import dialog shows expected columns, valid functions, and valid positions

nationality_flags_display.description: Nationality flags (🇵🇹, 🇧🇷, 🇪🇸) displayed correctly in members list

endpoints_tested: POST /api/members/import - CSV import with all columns
Role mapping: jogador, treinador, treinador_adjunto, delegado, responsavel, gestor_desportivo
Nationality conversion: PT, BR, ES, FR, IT, DE, GB, US, AO, MZ, CV, GW, ST, NL, BE, CH, AR, MA, RO

import_dialog.title: Importar Membros
import_dialog.description: Importar membros a partir de ficheiro Excel ou CSV
import_dialog.expected_columns: Nome, Apelido, Data de Nascimento, Email, Função
import_dialog.valid_functions: jogador, treinador, treinador adjunto, delegado, responsável, gestor desportivo

critical_code_review_comments: Import endpoint correctly handles all 10 columns: Nome, Apelido, Data de Nascimento, Email, Função, Número, Posição, Telefone, Nacionalidade, Sexo
Role mapping supports PT, EN, ES variations (e.g., 'treinador', 'coach', 'entrenador')
Position normalization handles multiple formats (GR, guarda-redes, goalkeeper, portero)
Nationality conversion supports 20+ countries with ISO codes
Duplicate email detection generates warnings but allows creation (for family accounts)
Gender normalization handles M/F, Masculino/Feminino, male/female
seed_data_creation: Test import created multiple test users with 'test_import_' prefix in email
context_for_next_testing_agent: Member import functionality fully tested. All 21 pytest tests pass. Import supports CSV and Excel files with 10 columns. Role mapping, position normalization, nationality conversion, and duplicate email warnings all working correctly. Frontend import dialog displays all expected information.

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCKED - Resend email requires user API key
